---
id: retrieves-country-borders-geo-json-data
title: "Retrieves country borders GeoJSON data"
description: "Returns GeoJSON FeatureCollection containing country border geometries. Response is cached for 1 day."
sidebar_label: "Retrieves country borders GeoJSON data"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"

custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Retrieves country borders GeoJSON data"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/countries/borders"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns GeoJSON FeatureCollection containing country border geometries. Response is cached for 1 day.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
